purpose: Data-driven budget thresholds based on actual token consumption

procedure.step_1: Run 5 sample incidents through existing agents via src/run.js
procedure.step_2: Record token consumption from Anthropic API response.usage
procedure.step_3: Calculate mean, p50, p90, p99 per agent
procedure.step_4: Set per-agent daily budget = p99 + 20% headroom
procedure.step_5: Set per-incident budget = sum of all agent p99 + 30% headroom
procedure.step_6: Set daily org budget = expected daily incidents * per-incident budget
